goal_text:
You are looking for information in Cambridge.
You are looking for a 'particular restaurant'. Its name is called 'shiraz restaurant'.
Make sure you get 'postcode'.
You are also looking for a 'train'. The train should depart from 'birmingham new street' and should go to 'cambridge'.
The train should 'arrive by 21:15' and should leave on 'monday'.
Make sure you get 'price', 'travel time', and 'departure time'.Remember. You don't want booking for restaurant. Just get the information and it all done.
Remember. You don't want booking for train. Just get the information and it all done.

message: You are looking for information in Cambridge
You are looking for a particular restaurant. Its name is called shiraz restaurant
You are also looking for a train. The train should depart from birmingham new street and should go to cambridge
The train should arrive by 21:15 and should leave on monday
Make sure you get price, travel time, and departure time
